mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_dispatch_project_header (`dispatchName`, `dispatchNo`, `dispatchSeq`, `contractNos`, `projectIds`, `type`, `state`, `peopleNum`, `callbackState`, `facilitatorId`, `facilitatorCode`, `facilitatorName`, `bankInfo`, `bankAccount`, `officeCode`, `profitDepCode`, `dutyPerson`, `officeDutyPerson`, `isAccrued`, `isInvoiced`, `dispatchAmount`, `prepaidInfo`, `prepaidRule`, `acceptanceInfo`, `reason`, `remark`, `dispatchTime`, `smsProjectCode`, `smsSubmitTime`, `smsProjectAmount`, `smsAfProjectAmount`, `effectiveFrom`, `effectiveTo`, `disabled`, `dispatched`, `settled`, `createBy`, `createTime`, `updateBy`, `updateTime`, `customInfo`) values (#{dispatchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractNos,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{peopleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{callbackState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{facilitatorId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{facilitatorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{facilitatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profitDepCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{officeDutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isAccrued,jdbcType=BIT}, #{isInvoiced,jdbcType=BIT}, #{dispatchAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prepaidInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prepaidRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptanceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{smsProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{smsSubmitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{smsProjectAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{smsAfProjectAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{dispatched,jdbcType=BIT}, #{settled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER})
mapper.update:
update pm_dispatch_project_header set `dispatchName` = #{dispatchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `dispatchNo` = #{dispatchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `dispatchSeq` = #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `contractNos` = #{contractNos,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `projectIds` = #{projectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `state` = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `peopleNum` = #{peopleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `callbackState` = #{callbackState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `facilitatorId` = #{facilitatorId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `facilitatorCode` = #{facilitatorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `facilitatorName` = #{facilitatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `bankInfo` = #{bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `bankAccount` = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `officeCode` = #{officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `profitDepCode` = #{profitDepCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `dutyPerson` = #{dutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `officeDutyPerson` = #{officeDutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `isAccrued` = #{isAccrued,jdbcType=BIT}, `isInvoiced` = #{isInvoiced,jdbcType=BIT}, `dispatchAmount` = #{dispatchAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `prepaidInfo` = #{prepaidInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `prepaidRule` = #{prepaidRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `acceptanceInfo` = #{acceptanceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `reason` = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `remark` = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `dispatchTime` = #{dispatchTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `smsProjectCode` = #{smsProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `smsSubmitTime` = #{smsSubmitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `smsProjectAmount` = #{smsProjectAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `smsAfProjectAmount` = #{smsAfProjectAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `effectiveFrom` = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `effectiveTo` = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `disabled` = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, `dispatched` = #{dispatched,jdbcType=BIT}, `settled` = #{settled,jdbcType=BIT}, `createBy` = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `createTime` = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `updateBy` = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `updateTime` = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}) where `id` = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select h.*, d.`departmentName` as officeName, d1.`departmentName` as profitDepName, bd.`basicDataName` as stateName, bd1.`basicDataName` as callbackStateName, bd2.basicDataName as typeName, concat(h.createBy, "-", ui.`realName`) as createName from pm_dispatch_project_header h left join fnd_department d on h.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` left join fnd_department d1 on h.`profitDepCode` = d1.`departmentNum` left join `fnd_basic_data` bd on h.`state` = bd.`basicDataId` and bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchState' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd1 on h.`callbackState` = bd1.`basicDataId` and bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchCbState' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd2 on h.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` and bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchType' left join t_user u on u.`user_name` = h.`createBy` left join t_user_info ui on ui.`user_id` = u.`user_id`
and ui.compID = #{model.orgId, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_dispatch_project_header
id,
dispatchName,
dispatchNo,
dispatchSeq,
contractNos,
projectIds,
type,
state,
peopleNum,
callbackState,
facilitatorId,
facilitatorCode,
facilitatorName,
bankInfo,
bankAccount,
officeCode,
profitDepCode,
dutyPerson,
officeDutyPerson,
isAccrued,
isInvoiced,
dispatchAmount,
prepaidInfo,
prepaidRule,
acceptanceInfo,
reason,
remark,
dispatchTime,
smsProjectCode,
smsSubmitTime,
smsProjectAmount,
effectiveFrom,
effectiveTo,
disabled,
dispatched,
settled,
createBy,
createTime,
updateBy,
updateTime,
customInfo,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dispatchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dispatchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contractNos,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{peopleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{callbackState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{facilitatorId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{facilitatorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{facilitatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{profitDepCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{officeDutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isAccrued,jdbcType=BIT},
#{isInvoiced,jdbcType=BIT},
#{dispatchAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{prepaidInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{prepaidRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{acceptanceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dispatchTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{smsProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{smsSubmitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{smsProjectAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{dispatched,jdbcType=BIT},
#{settled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER},
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
dispatchName = values(dispatchName),
dispatchNo = values(dispatchNo),
dispatchSeq = values(dispatchSeq),
contractNos = values(contractNos),
projectIds = values(projectIds),
type = values(type),
state = values(state),
peopleNum = values(peopleNum),
callbackState = values(callbackState),
facilitatorId = values(facilitatorId),
facilitatorCode = values(facilitatorCode),
facilitatorName = values(facilitatorName),
bankInfo = values(bankInfo),
bankAccount = values(bankAccount),
officeCode = values(officeCode),
profitDepCode = values(profitDepCode),
dutyPerson = values(dutyPerson),
officeDutyPerson = values(officeDutyPerson),
isAccrued = values(isAccrued),
isInvoiced = values(isInvoiced),
dispatchAmount = values(dispatchAmount),
prepaidInfo = values(prepaidInfo),
prepaidRule = values(prepaidRule),
acceptanceInfo = values(acceptanceInfo),
reason = values(reason),
remark = values(remark),
dispatchTime = values(dispatchTime),
smsProjectCode = values(smsProjectCode),
smsSubmitTime = values(smsSubmitTime),
smsProjectAmount = values(smsProjectAmount),
effectiveFrom = values(effectiveFrom),
effectiveTo = values(effectiveTo),
disabled = values(disabled),
dispatched = values(dispatched),
settled = values(settled),
updateBy = values(updateBy),
updateTime = values(updateTime),
customInfo = values(customInfo),
mapper.select:
select h.*, d.`departmentName` as officeName, d1.`departmentName` as profitDepName, bd.`basicDataName` as stateName, bd1.`basicDataName` as callbackStateName, bd2.basicDataName as typeName, concat(h.createBy, "-", ui.`realName`) as createName from `pm_dispatch_project_header` h left join fnd_department d on h.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` left join fnd_department d1 on h.`profitDepCode` = d1.`departmentNum` left join `fnd_basic_data` bd on h.`state` = bd.`basicDataId` and bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchState' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd1 on h.`callbackState` = bd1.`basicDataId` and bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchCbState' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd2 on h.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` and bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchType' left join t_user u on u.`user_name` = h.`createBy` left join t_user_info ui on ui.`user_id` = u.`user_id`
and ui.compID = #{orgId, jdbcType=INTEGER}

and ui.compID = #{orgId, jdbcType=INTEGER}
group by h.`id`

and ui.compID = #{model.orgId, jdbcType=INTEGER}
group by h.`id`
mapper.sql:
select JSON_SET(h.customInfo, '$.projectProgress', IFNULL(ph.customInfo ->> "$.projectProgress", 0), '$.projectStateName', IFNULL(phsd.`basicDataName`, "")) as customInfo, h.*, d.`departmentName` as officeName, d1.`departmentName` as profitDepName, bd.`basicDataName` as stateName, bd1.`basicDataName` as callbackStateName, bd2.basicDataName as typeName, concat(h.createBy, "-", ui.`realName`) as createName, sum(sc.`collected_money_amount`) as collectedAmount, sum(sc.`delivered_money_amount`) as deliveredAmount, sum(sc.`contract_money_amount`) as contractAmount, group_concat(sc.`contract_num`) as collectContractNos, ROUND(sum(sc.`collected_money_amount`) / sum(sc.`contract_money_amount`), 4) as collectedRatio, ds.settledAmount
,ROUND(ds.settledAmount / replace(h.dispatchAmount, ",","") * 100, 2) as settledRatio from
pm_dispatch_project_header h left join `sms_ofst_contract_head_sap` sc on FIND_IN_SET(sc.`contract_num`, h.`contractNos`) left join `pm_project` ph on ph.projectId = h.projectIds left join (select dispatchId, sum(replace(ds.`amount`, ",", "")) as settledAmount from `pm_dispatch_project_settlement` ds where ds.`disabled` = false group by ds.`dispatchId`) ds on ds.`dispatchId` = h.`id` left join fnd_department d on h.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` left join fnd_department d1 on h.`profitDepCode` = d1.`departmentNum` left join `fnd_basic_data` bd on h.`state` = bd.`basicDataId` and bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchState' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd1 on h.`callbackState` = bd1.`basicDataId` and bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchCbState' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd2 on h.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` and bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchType' LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data phsd ON phsd.`dataTypeCode` = concat(ph.`projectType`, "_projectState") AND phsd.`basicDataId` = ph.`projectState` left join t_user u on u.`user_name` = h.`createBy` left join t_user_info ui on ui.`user_id` = u.`user_id`

if.if: (h.contractNos like concat("%", #{model.contractNos}, "%") or h.dispatchNo like concat("%", #{model.contractNos}, "%")) AND
(h.`effectiveTo` is null or h.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

trim.if: ( h.dispatchName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.contractNos like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.facilitatorName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.smsProjectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.smsProjectAmount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
(h.`effectiveTo` is null or h.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

sql.if: (h.`effectiveTo` is null or h.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

if.if: (h.`effectiveTo` is null or h.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

sql.if: ( h.`dispatchName` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`dispatchNo` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`dispatchSeq` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`contractNos` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`projectIds` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`type` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`facilitatorCode` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`facilitatorName` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`bankInfo` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`bankAccount` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`officeCode` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`profitDepCode` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`dutyPerson` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`officeDutyPerson` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`dispatchAmount` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`prepaidInfo` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`prepaidRule` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`acceptanceInfo` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`reason` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`remark` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`smsProjectCode` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`smsProjectAmount` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`smsAfProjectAmount` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`createBy` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`updateBy` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.`customInfo` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
